content.text:
<recommended_plugins>
Here is a list of plugins that are available but not installed. If the user's query would benefit from one of these plugins, use the `request_plugin_install` tool to suggest that they install it. Pass the parenthesized ID as `plugin_id`. For example, suggest the Google Drive plugin if the query could possibly be better answered with access to Google Drive.

- Atlassian Rovo (atlassian-rovo@openai-curated-remote)
- Box (box@openai-curated-remote)
- Figma (figma@openai-curated-remote)
- Gmail (gmail@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Calendar (google-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Drive (google-drive@openai-curated-remote)
- Notion (notion@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Calendar (outlook-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Email (outlook-email@openai-curated-remote)
- SharePoint (sharepoint@openai-curated-remote)
- Slack (slack@openai-curated-remote)
- Teams (teams@openai-curated-remote)
</recommended_plugins>

Review the code changes against the base branch 'main'. The merge base commit for this comparison is 769386c7839a85e47b6be90555d7853dd21ba46e. Run `git diff 769386c7839a85e47b6be90555d7853dd21ba46e` to inspect the changes relative to main. Provide prioritized, actionable findings.

input.input: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' /Users/cysp/.agents/skills/code-review/SKILL.md && printf '\\n---MEMORY HITS---\\n' && rg -n \"cyspbot|branch-diff|code review\" /Users/cysp/.codex/memories/MEMORY.md | head -40","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git rev-parse 769386c7839a85e47b6be90555d7853dd21ba46e && git status --short && git log --oneline 769386c7839a85e47b6be90555d7853dd21ba46e..HEAD && git diff --stat 769386c7839a85e47b6be90555d7853dd21ba46e && git diff --name-status 769386c7839a85e47b6be90555d7853dd21ba46e && find .. -maxdepth 2 \\( -name 'AGENTS.md' -o -name 'CONTRIBUTING.md' -o -name 'CODING_STANDARDS.md' \\) -print","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git diff 769386c7839a85e47b6be90555d7853dd21ba46e -- packages/oidc/src/issuer-adapter.ts packages/oidc-issuer-fly/src/issuer.ts packages/oidc-issuer-google-service-account/src/issuer.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/authentication.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/oidc-issuers.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy packages/oidc-issuer-fly/test packages/oidc-issuer-google-service-account/test test/authentication.test.ts test/oidc-issuers.test.ts","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git diff 769386c7839a85e47b6be90555d7853dd21ba46e -- workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/dependencies.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/index.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/token-exchange.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/wrangler.jsonc package.json 'packages/*/package.json' test/fly-machine-token-policy-rule.test.ts test/google-service-account-token-policy-rule.test.ts README.md docs/service-contract.md SECURITY.md CONTEXT.md && sed -n '1,220p' workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/authentication.ts && rg -n \"configuredOidcIssuerAdapters|FLY_OIDC_ORG_SLUGS\"","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"corepack pnpm run check && corepack pnpm run test","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":1000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(JSON.stringify(r))

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"subjectTokenType|id_token|jwt\" workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src test packages/oidc-issuer-* | head -120 && git diff --check 769386c7839a85e47b6be90555d7853dd21ba46e && sed -n '1,120p' packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/src/issuer.ts && git show 769386c:packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/src/issuer.ts","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)
